name: n8n Cloud API
what_it_does: n8n — open-source, self-hostable workflow automation tool with 400+ integrations, code-first nodes (JavaScript/Python), and a REST API for programmatic workflow management.
use_cases: Agents triggering n8n workflows to orchestrate complex multi-step SaaS automations via webhook or API call
AI workflow chaining — n8n's AI nodes let agents build and trigger LLM pipelines with human-in-the-loop steps
Self-hosted automation for data-sensitive workflows where SaaS iPaaS tools can't be used
Custom integrations via code nodes — agents executing arbitrary JavaScript/Python within workflow steps
Workflow as a service — agents creating and managing workflows programmatically for end-user automation
not_for: Teams wanting a fully managed, zero-maintenance automation platform — self-hosted n8n requires infrastructure ops
Enterprise-scale, mission-critical workflows with SLA requirements — use Workato or MuleSoft for enterprise grade
Non-technical teams wanting purely visual no-code — n8n's power requires coding for complex use cases
best_when: You need code-first automation with full control over data handling, self-hosted deployment, and 400+ connectors — n8n is the open-source power user's automation platform.
avoid_when: You want a fully managed, enterprise-supported iPaaS — use Workato or Tray.io for enterprise-grade support.

auth.notes: API key from n8n settings. n8n Cloud uses bearer token. Self-hosted supports basic auth, LDAP. Workflow webhooks can have their own auth configured per workflow.

pricing.free_tier_limits: Self-hosted Community Edition: free forever; Cloud Starter: free trial
pricing.paid_tiers: Cloud Starter: $24/month (2,500 executions); Pro: $60/month (10,000 executions); Enterprise: custom
pricing.notes: Self-hosted is completely free and open source. n8n Cloud is managed hosting. Fair-code license — free for internal use, paid for commercial resale.

performance.rate_limits: Cloud: execution-based limits by plan; Self-hosted: no limits beyond your infrastructure

agent_readiness.error_message_notes: OpenAPI-documented REST API. Workflow execution errors available via execution endpoint. Webhook trigger errors include detailed node-level error context.
agent_readiness.idempotency_notes: Workflow creation is idempotent with same name. Executions are not idempotent by default — depends on workflow logic. Webhook triggers fire once per request.
known_agent_gotchas: Workflows must be activated before webhook triggers work — inactive workflows return 404 on webhook calls
Execution data is retained based on pruning settings — old executions may not be available via API
n8n Cloud and self-hosted APIs are identical but self-hosted may lag on version — check running version
Code nodes run in sandboxed Node.js — no filesystem access or network calls outside n8n's permitted list
AI agent nodes require separate credentials for each LLM provider — not inherited from environment

security_score_components.security_notes: Open source — fully auditable. Credentials stored encrypted. Self-hosted gives full data control. n8n Cloud SOC2 certified. GDPR compliant. Fair-code license.
